case_title: IRON-WOOD et al VS SCHARETG, SHAUN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHARETG, SHAUN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,139.07 FILED BY IRON-WOOD CLARK, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT SCHARETG, SHAUN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-19-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-17-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON JULY 17, 2001, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSIED WITH PREJUDICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHARETG, SHAUN
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED TO COURT; INSUFFIIENT ADDRESS.
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-06-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-02-2001 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-06-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO JUN-19-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 WORK NECESSITY.
